redemptionType: Existing bToken holders can redeem through Backed; new issuance is no longer available for bTokens.
liquidityNotes: CoinGecko showed zero 24-hour volume and no current listed-exchange activity. Direct redemption remains supported, but settlement time, minimum amount, settlement asset, and suspension terms were not verified. The official 0.5% figure is a general issuance/redemption fee, not an early-redemption fee.

_meta.notes: Liquidity scoring is deferred to the designated grading stage after source verification.
